sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ آيَةُ تَشْعُرُ بِالْغِيرَةِ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Aja je osjećala ljubomoru prema svojoj mlađoj sestri.
sentences.translationEn: Aya used to feel jealous of her younger sister.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ أُمَّهَا تُحِبُّ أُخْتَهَا أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Mislila je da majka više voli njenu sestru.
sentences.translationEn: She believed that her mother loved her sister more.

sentences.translation: Razgovarala je s majkom i saznala istinu.
sentences.translationEn: She talked with her mother and learned the truth.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الأُمُّ «أَحِبُّكِ أَنْتِ وَأُخْتَكِ بِنَفْسِ الْقَدْرِ».
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla "volim tebe i tvoju sestru jednako".
sentences.translationEn: The mother said "I love you and your sister equally".
